column1: C[Slava: the very center star point is called tengen, and usually isnt a good starting area

C[Slava: you should take the corners first
C[Slava: Good. c16 and d17 are usually good too
C[Slava: Hm. thats a little slow. Better to take the other corner first, or expand outward along the sides of the D16
Slava: Not quite. More like c14 or d14. Expanding along the sides of the board
C[Slava: so, you've pretty much made that corner yours

C[Slava: Also, make sure you hit submit everytime. Sometimes people forget

Slava: which means its in Atari
